title: Replit AI Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for using Replit AI effectively in coding projects.

commands.description: Sets randomness of AI output for creative coding solutions.
commands.scenario: When generating creative code snippets or brainstorming new ideas.

commands.description: Specifies the AI model version for code generation.
commands.scenario: When you need a balance between cost and performance in code suggestions.

commands.command: Think step by step. Then verify your answer.
commands.description: Encourages logical reasoning and verification in AI responses.
commands.scenario: When debugging complex algorithms or logic-heavy code.

commands.description: Enables streaming of AI responses for real-time feedback.
commands.scenario: When you need immediate insights or iterative code suggestions.

commands.description: Limits the length of AI-generated code to manage cost and relevance.
commands.scenario: When generating short code snippets or functions.

commands.command: Provide detailed comments for each code block.
commands.description: Instructs AI to include comments for better understanding of generated code.
commands.scenario: When teaching or documenting code for educational purposes.

commands.description: Sets the context length for AI to consider in code generation.
commands.scenario: When working on large projects requiring extensive context.

commands.description: Prompts AI to generate code with short, clear variable names.
commands.scenario: When optimizing code readability and maintainability.

commands.description: Adjusts AI settings to minimize cost while maintaining output quality.
commands.scenario: When running multiple AI queries and managing budget.

commands.description: Reduces randomness for deterministic code outputs.
commands.scenario: When building a code review bot that needs deterministic output.

commands.command: Provide examples of input and expected output.
commands.description: Instructs AI to generate code with example usage scenarios.
commands.scenario: When creating functions or APIs that require clear usage examples.

commands.description: Enables detailed logging for troubleshooting AI-generated code.
commands.scenario: When diagnosing issues with AI suggestions or integrations.

commands.command: Act as a Senior Staff Engineer and perform a security audit on this snippet.
commands.description: Uses persona prompting to trigger more rigorous code review and vulnerability detection.
Adjusts nucleus sampling to control the diversity of the output tokens, useful for creative coding tasks.

commands.command: Refactor this code to reduce time complexity from O(n^2) to O(n log n).
commands.description: Specific instruction pattern to force the AI to focus on algorithmic efficiency rather than just syntax.

commands.command: Generate unit tests using the pytest framework with 100% edge case coverage.
commands.description: Directs the AI to focus on boundary conditions and specific testing libraries.

commands.command: Explain this code using the Feynman Technique.
commands.description: A prompt engineering pattern that forces the AI to simplify complex logic into digestible, intuitive explanations.
